_comment: Closed allowlist of categories for SG-4 option-b documented exceptions. Slab 7b Wave 0 foundational artifact (FR109). Authored 2026-04-29. Required reading: docs/dev-guide/bmb-sanctum-alignment-checklist.md §5. ADDITIONS to this allowlist require party-mode consensus + governance-JSON entry trail; silent invocation of an unlisted category in a SKILL.md `# Sanctum exception` block is a HALT-AND-REMEDIATE governance failure per Slab 7b PRD FR101 parity-test C-7.

categories.name: Sidecar Hook (operator-control authority living as runtime hook)
categories.description: Specialist is operator-control authority that operates as a runtime hook (substrate-coherence checker, gate validator, etc.) rather than a conversational specialist. Persona-shaped continuity does not apply because the specialist has no operator dialogue surface; substrate gates are the only interaction shape.
categories.party_mode_ratification: Slab 7b PRD R1 ratification of SG-4 with closed-allowlist option-b path

_explicitly_excluded.rationale: Per Slab 7b PRD D20 (R9 amendment): Class-D2 pipeline-greenfield specialists follow the scaffold-v0.2-D2-pipeline variant (FR111) which is canonical inside the BMB regime, NOT an exception. Class-D2 specialists are identified by `class: D2` in the per-specialist registry; the parity-test skips sanctum-presence checks for `class: D2` rows via the C-4 branch. NO option-b allowlist category required, NO party-mode ratification required for Class-D2 specialists invoking the variant. The variant scaffold is pre-ratified architecture, not per-instance exception.

_addition_protocol.step_1: Dev agent encounters a specialist whose nature legitimately doesn't fit any existing allowlist category AND isn't covered by Class-D2 variant.
_addition_protocol.step_2: Dev agent files a party-mode round to ratify a new category. Round inputs: proposed category id + name + description + rationale template + precedent.
_addition_protocol.step_3: Party-mode reaches consensus or supermajority. If consensus violates SG-4 intent (any drift toward 'two mental models'), reject.
_addition_protocol.step_4: Add new category row to this JSON. Update added_at + added_by + party_mode_ratification fields.
_addition_protocol.step_5: Document the addition in the Slab's retrospective (per CLAUDE.md §Deferred-inventory governance).
_addition_protocol.step_6: Update docs/dev-guide/bmb-sanctum-alignment-checklist.md §5 worked examples if a new precedent emerges.
